text.content:
Brujah

The Rabble

In-Clan Disciplines: Celerity, Potence, Presence

Clan Bane

Short Fuse. The Brujah's Beast is close to the surface. Subtract Bane Severity dice from any roll to resist Frenzy. Brujah enter frenzy more easily than any other clan — even minor provocations can set them off.

Compulsion

Rebellion. The vampire must go against the wishes of whoever holds authority in the scene — Prince, boss, Primogen, or anyone giving orders. They must openly defy, contradict, or undermine the authority figure. Until they do, they suffer a 2-dice penalty to all rolls. Simply remaining silent is not enough — they must act against the authority.
